first_run.rationale: The score is identical across both evaluations. The justifications and strengths are substantively the same, highlighting the candidate's full-stack experience, relevant tech stack, and leadership. The differences in the 'concerns' section appear to be standard run-to-run noise, where the model focuses on different minor details or missing keywords in each generation. There is no evidence that changing the university from a Romanian to a US institution caused a material shift in the model's assessment of the candidate's qualifications.
